summary: TWO_COLUMN core EOLA matrix intuition. Left: NumberPlane with a translucent unit square, RED basis vector e1, GREEN basis vector e2, and YELLOW x=[-1,2]. Right: A=[[3,1],[1,2]] with columns highlighted, then formulas A e1=[3,1]^T and A e2=[1,2]^T. ApplyMatrix transforms the whole plane about its own origin so e1 and e2 visibly land on the matrix columns. Final step decomposes A x as -1 A e1 + 2 A e2, using semi-transparent vector copies to land on the YELLOW result.
